channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: No CS degree? No problem
item.description: Senior engineer without a CS degree? Learn the real skills that matter—connection pooling, caching, and observing production systems. Real case studies, benchmarks, and actionable steps.

item.title: Choose the Right Realtime Protocol in 30 Minutes
item.description: Pick the right realtime protocol in 5 minutes — latency, cost, and browser support compared for WebSocket, SSE, and long polling (2026 data).

item.title: AI pair programmers: what 15k devs shipped in 2026
item.description: Ship a SaaS in hours not weeks using Next.js 15, tRPC, Drizzle & Vercel — the 2026 stack that turns AI pair programmers into real products.

item.title: RAG in prod: the missing checklist
item.description: The goal was simple: reduce ticket volume by 40% within six months without adding headcount.

item.title: Cut cloud carbon 45% without sacrificing speed
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 45% without sacrificing speed — real AWS cost and latency numbers from a health-tech rebuild. Includes code, benchmarks, and the one misconfiguration that wasted 12% energy.

item.title: Negotiate pay: FX vs local costs
item.description: Negotiate remote pay in 2026 with a free Python CLI that adjusts for FX and local cost of living — saves 3–4 hours per negotiation and increases final offers by 14–99%

item.title: Fine-tuning pays 25% more in 2026
item.description: Fine-tuning pays 25–40% more than prompt engineering in 2026 — the real ROI breakdown on salaries, costs, and benchmarks. Use this data to pick the skill that actually moves the needle.

item.title: Instrument LLMs, don't just call them
item.description: Cut LLM pipeline debugging time 96% with OpenTelemetry 1.33: add per-stage latency, GPU memory, token counters, and sampling rules that cost $18/day on Grafana Cloud.

item.title: Over-engineered APIs cost $30k/month
item.description: Cut AWS costs 98% by replacing a microservices cluster with a single service — connection pooling, caching, and the simplicity mistake most teams make.

item.title: Skip the vector DB?
item.description: Cut vector search costs 60% by measuring p99 first — FAISS 1.8 vs Pinecone Serverless 2026.09 benchmark, recall trade-offs, and the one metric every team skips until it’s too late.

item.title: 5G’s 8-second socket trap
item.description: Cut mobile write failures 89% by tuning Redis connection pools for 5G latency spikes — socket timeouts, deduplication, and Prometheus metrics you can deploy today.

item.title: Build a portfolio Africa remote hires want
item.description: Remote jobs ignore GitHub stars — deploy real systems instead. Build one project users depend on, not 10 PRs. Real examples from Nairobi fintech with latency, cost and scale numbers.

item.title: Senior devs quit big tech for these 3 reasons
item.description: Cut big-tech burnout 40% with a 12-point scorecard — autonomy, impact, learning, and health metrics that senior engineers use before they accept offers in 2026.

item.title: AI misses your codebase's blind spots
item.description: Cut AI suggestion failures 60% by giving models real query plans and latency data — pgMustard, OpenTelemetry, and Cody Pro in 2026.

item.title: Laptop LLM setup that really works
item.description: Cut LLM costs to zero with a laptop setup that actually works — real benchmarks, version-pinned tools, and the mistakes I made running Mistral 7B on M2 Macs in 2026.

item.title: Recover from freelance burnout in 3 steps
item.description: Cut freelance burnout in 30 days with real metrics, contract firewalls, and a 12-minute ritual. Three concrete numbers and a first-person mistake included.

item.title: Pool size myths holding you back
item.description: Cut database wait time 70% by dropping the maxPoolSize=10 myth. Measure concurrency, not CPU cores, to tune connection pooling in PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Redis.

item.title: Decode MCP servers: hidden traps in AI tooling
item.description: Cut MCP latency 94% and save 77% on costs — the tooling choices, pooling sizes, and ping loop tweaks most teams miss when wiring AI agents to databases, files, and legacy systems in 2026.

item.title: Big Tech exodus: the non-money reasons in 2026
item.description: Cut on-call pages 62% and promotion cycles 50% — the non-money reasons senior engineers left big tech in 2026 and what to check first

item.title: Skip the degree, learn systems
item.description: Cut 47 minutes of Redis outages and $18k in SLA penalties by learning systems without a CS degree. Real failure modes, tools, and habits that move you from junior to senior in 18 months.
